result.stdout:
Usage: PlainSql.Migrations.Tool [options]

Options:
  -c|--connectionstring <CONNECTION_STRING>             The connection string
  -m|--migrationscriptfolder <MIGRATION_SCRIPT_FOLDER>  The folder where the
                                                        migration scripts are
                                                        located
  -d|--databasetype <DATABASE_TYPE>                     The database type to
                                                        connect to
  -t|--createmigrationstable                            Should migrations be
                                                        logged in a migrations
                                                        table
  -?|-h|--help                                          Show help information
